questions.text: Who proposed the Modern Periodic Law?
questions.explanation: Henry Moseley proposed the Modern Periodic Law in 1913, stating that properties are periodic functions of atomic number.

questions.text: Elements in the same group have similar chemical properties.
questions.explanation: Elements in the same group have same number of valence electrons, hence similar chemical properties.

questions.correctAnswer: Elements in Group 18 with complete outer shell, very unreactive.
questions.explanation: Noble gases (He, Ne, Ar, Kr, Xe, Rn) have complete valence shells, making them chemically inert or unreactive.

questions.text: The modern periodic table has ________ groups.
questions.explanation: The modern periodic table has 18 vertical columns called groups and 7 horizontal rows called periods.
